trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h candle close above EMA20 ($73,980) following a retest of ATR expected low
confluence_signals: Extreme short crowd (4th percentile L/S ratio)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Strong alignment of 4+ signals including extreme retail short positioning (contrarian bullish) and healthy OI accumulation during price discovery.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price retest of EMA20 ($2,343) with Taker Buy Ratio > 52%
confluence_signals: Extreme short crowd (2nd percentile L/S ratio)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Extreme retail shorting and significant OI buildup suggest a high-probability short squeeze, though Hyperliquid smart money distribution slightly tempers the win rate.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h RSI bounce from 50 level and recovery of Binance price discount
confluence_signals: Extreme short crowd (0th percentile L/S ratio)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Arbitrage pressure from Binance discount combined with the lowest L/S ratio percentile in the group provides a strong contrarian foundation.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price breakout above $87.19 (7d high) on volume ratio > 1.2x
confluence_signals: Extreme short crowd (2nd percentile L/S ratio)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: The combination of high compression and accelerating funding velocity indicates an imminent volatility expansion, likely to the upside given the short-heavy positioning.

results.cross_asset_insight: The market is in a high-conviction 'Wall of Worry' rally. Despite Extreme Fear (12) and Smart Money distribution, the extreme retail shorting (L/S ratios at 0-4th percentiles) and rising ETH/BTC ratio suggest a massive short-squeeze regime is active, favoring altcoin outperformance.
